sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Orange at [[35, 34], [35, 38], [36, 38], [36, 34]] (cols 34-38, rows 35-36)
# Try going UP to reach the top horizontal area (rows 20-24)

# Go UP multiple times
result = action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"After 8 UP - Orange: {n['boundary']}")
        break
print("Done:", result.get('done', False))
print("Level completed:", result.get('level_completed', False))

# Check area around blocks
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        r_min = n['boundary'][0][0]
        c_min = n['boundary'][0][1]
        c_max = n['boundary'][1][1]
        print(f"\nAround orange (rows {r_min-2}-{r_min+4}, cols {c_min-2}-{c_max+6}):")
        for r in range(r_min-2, r_min+5):
            print(f"  {r}: {lines[r][c_min-2:c_max+6]}")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
